name: Garlic Mayonnaise Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the minced garlic, finely chopped green onion tops and bottoms, and olive oil in a bowl.
2. Gradually add the mayonnaise to the mixture and stir until well blended.
3. Allow the mixture to sit until the oil is absorbed into the mayonnaise.
4. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Makes about 2 1/2 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Asparagus, Red Bell Pepper, Broccoli, Potato Skins, Roast Beef, Turkey
